inputs.label: Compounding Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Number of compounding periods per year (1=annual, 2=semi-annual, 12=monthly, etc.).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of compounding periods per year (1=annual, 2=semi-annual, 12=monthly, etc.).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık bileşik dönem sayısı (1=yıllık, 2=altı aylık, 12=aylık, vb.).

businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de périodes de capitalisation par an (1=annuel, 2=semestriel, 12=mensuel, etc.).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de períodos de capitalización por año (1=anual, 2=semestral, 12=mensual, etc.)
